problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — specifically Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
